description: Style NoteIt doesn't get classier than cartier. Declaration by Cartier is a woody musky fragrance for men, launched in 1998. The nose behind this fragrance is Jean-Claude Ellena. The bottle is a clean glass flacon with a metal top. Product DetailsThe top notes in Declaration are artemisia, caraway, coriander, birch, mandarin orange, bergamot, neroli and bitter orange blending into a heart of iris, ginger, cinnamon, pepper, juniper, orris root, jasmine and Guatemalan cardamom. The base notes are leather, amber, tea, Tahitian vetiver, oakmoss and cedar.CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize100 ml
